prompt: Change the color scheme to a classic 8-bit video game palette.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, a screenshot of a computer desktop interface, to apply a classic 8-bit video game color palette to its entire visual content. All interface elements, including the dark background, application icons, text, and the top and left side bars, should be re-rendered with the characteristic limited color depth and vibrant, retro hues typical of 8-bit graphics.
objects: computer desktop interface with 8-bit color palette
left side bar/dock with 8-bit color palette
Red Hat Enterprise Linux logo with 8-bit color palette
